title: XpLands
description: Adds a new dimension for all your xp needs
body:
This mod adds a new dimension with a bunch of stuff xp related, so here are a few things

- Portal block
- Two new wood types
- Two new stone brick types
- Fast way to get xp
- Uranium (please dont eat it)
- All within a new dimension

Small guide: get uranium and xp portal blocks in the overworld deep underground, everything else is in the dimension

(a few things to note, the trees do not decay or have saplings, the leaves drop leaf blocks when broken, but this will change in the future. I will add some things here and there but this is the main core of the mod)

(this mod was also made in MCreator, pretty cool program that makes modding easy for smooth brains like me who dont know any coding languages)
